heading: Payment of compensation for victims of terrorism
label: 1013 Payment of compensation for victims of terrorism
text: Any benefit or payment pursuant to , or section 1032 or 1095a or chapter 110 of title 10, shall be paid out of funds available to the Secretary concerned for military personnel.section 559 of this title
notes: CodificationAnother section 1013 was renumbered .section 1014 of this title
Amendments1990— substituted “1095a” for “1095”.Pub. L. 101–5101988— substituted “section 1032” for “section 1051”.Pub. L. 100–456
amendments: Amendments1990— substituted “1095a” for “1095”.Pub. L. 101–5101988— substituted “section 1032” for “section 1051”.Pub. L. 100–456
